description: Embeds a game level player inline within a UI screen. Renders a TUIFY game world inside a fixed-size canvas within regular screen layouts.

targetWorldId.description: ID of a world-kind screen to load as the game source

autoPlay.description: Start the game immediately on load

notes: GameEmbed is distinct from a 'world' screen kind — it embeds a game preview inside a normal UI screen.
The targetWorldId must reference an existing screen with kind='world'.
For full-screen game play, use action='level' on a Button to navigate to a world screen instead.

examples.description: Embedded game preview on a landing screen
